name: inversion
description: Evaluations for inversion skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants to identify risks by flipping the problem or asking how to fail

prompts.input: 用反向思维分析：如果我想让这个项目彻底失败，我会做什么？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '反向思维' + 'how to guarantee failure' scenario

prompts.input: Before we launch, let's use inversion thinking: what could kill this product?
prompts.reason: Explicit English trigger 'inversion thinking' + risk identification

prompts.input: 逆向思维来分析：我怎样才能搞砸这个架构迁移？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '逆向思维' (inversion) + failure scenario

prompts.input: Instead of asking how to succeed, flip it: how would I guarantee failure?
prompts.reason: Explicit inversion framing: flip the problem

prompts.input: 这个方案有什么风险？用'如何失败'的角度来分析
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '如何失败' (how to fail) + risk assessment context

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for normal problem-solving, time-constrained scenarios, or post-failure analysis

prompts.input: 快速应对线上故障，需要立即行动
prompts.reason: Time-pressured incident; should trigger OODA-loop not inversion

prompts.input: Why did this deployment fail? Let's do root cause analysis
prompts.reason: Post-failure analysis should trigger five-whys, not inversion

prompts.input: I'm tired of overthinking. Just implement the solution now
prompts.reason: User wants to skip analysis; inversion doesn't apply here
